theme: mage tower with levitating glass floors, arcane crystals, rune pillars, violet flame

pillar_arcane_rune.usage: tall arcane pillar repeated along backline, glowing ring accent

crystal_cluster_arcane.usage: crystal formation at pillar bases or as mid-stage landmarks

tome_pile_floating.usage: arcane book scatter prop near pillars

brazier_arcane_violet.usage: violet flame brazier, repeated hall lighting accent
